chosen_action.title: Escalate live-ready StackOverflow answer for manual placement
chosen_action.question_title: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

why_this_action.summary: Codeberg adoption is still flat, the strongest fresh demand-capture asset already exists, and direct StackOverflow posting is still unavailable from this runtime, so the highest-leverage move is immediate manual-placement escalation rather than another packet refresh.

expected_outcome: One live placement or reuse of the current StackOverflow answer asset on a high-intent developer surface, with Codeberg as the primary repo destination.

measurement_window.success_metric: Answer posted or reused live, then any attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption delta.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If this answer is still unplaced by May 30, 2026, stop refreshing the same packet and switch to another executable high-intent lane.
